tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose tolerance or early diabetes, despite normal fasting glucose. Lipid profile is within target ranges, with slightly elevated triglycerides and LDL, but HDL is protective. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are normal. Recommend monitoring glycemic control and cardiovascular risk factors.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
